ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "peid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "affinity_bloc" TEXT /* Affinity bloc that the people group belongs to */,
  "people_cluster" TEXT /* Cluster of people (e.g., Arab, Deaf) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the demographic exists */,
  "people_group" TEXT /* Specific group of people */,
  "global_status" INTEGER /* Global status of Evangelical Christianity (1: Active, 0: Inactive) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion of the people group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size */,
  "addition_date" TEXT /* Date the data was added */,
  "addition_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for the addition or update of the population data */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) for more precise location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_people_group FOREIGN KEY ("people_group") REFERENCES people_groups ("group_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_addition_reasons FOREIGN KEY ("addition_reasons") REFERENCES addition_reasons ("reason_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_religion FOREIGN KEY ("religion") REFERENCES religions ("religion_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_people_cluster FOREIGN KEY ("people_cluster") REFERENCES people_clusters ("cluster_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_affinity_bloc FOREIGN KEY ("affinity_bloc") REFERENCES affinity_blocs ("bloc_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "affinity_blocs" (
  "bloc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affinity bloc */,
  "bloc_name" TEXT /* Name of the affinity bloc */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bloc's characteristics */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Specific geographic region the bloc is associated with */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the bloc */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the bloc information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bloc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each people cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the people cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster's defining traits */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Description of the geographic distribution of the cluster */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the cluster */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cluster information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the people group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the people group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the people group's characteristics */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Description of the geographic distribution of the group */,
  "population_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the group information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of language characteristics */,
  "native_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of native speakers */,
  "second_language_speakers" INTEGER /* Number of people who speak the language as a second language */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the language information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the religion */,
  "believers" INTEGER /* Number of believers in the religion */,
  "adherents" INTEGER /* Number of adherents (people who practice the religion) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the religion information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addition_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the addition reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the reason for addition or update */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the reason was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "peid" INTEGER /* PEID of the demographic data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_peid FOREIGN KEY ("peid") REFERENCES population_data ("peid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "peid" INTEGER /* PEID of the demographic data that was changed */,
  "old_population" INTEGER /* Population before the change */,
  "new_population" INTEGER /* Population after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the change record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_changes_peid FOREIGN KEY ("peid") REFERENCES population_data ("peid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_changes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
